projectDescription: A curated collection of 485+ terminal color schemes for iTerm2 and ports to 20+ other terminals and editors.
keyFeatures: 485+ terminal color schemes for iTerm2 in .itermcolors format
Ports to 20+ terminals: Alacritty, Kitty, Ghostty, Windows Terminal, Konsole, PuTTY, Xresources, Terminator, and more
Vim and VS Code color scheme exports
YAML-based scheme authoring format compatible with Gogh project
Python-based generation tooling (gen.py) using Jinja2 templates
Import shell script for bulk iTerm2 scheme installation
publicApiSurface: tools/gen.py -s <SchemeName> — generate all terminal formats for a scheme
tools/gen.py -t <template> — generate all schemes for a template
tools/import-scheme.sh schemes/* — import schemes into iTerm2
yaml/<ThemeName>.yml — YAML source format for color scheme authoring
schemes/<ThemeName>.itermcolors — iTerm2 native color scheme format
tools/kitty_to_yaml.py — convert Kitty config to YAML format
tools/ghostty_to_yaml.py — convert Ghostty config to YAML format
generate-all.sh — regenerate all terminal format exports (Docker)
